study_title: Apis mellifera ligustica Raw sequence reads
sample_description: capped frames of worker brood were shook vigorously to get rid of bees, and then kept in a humid incubator at 34 degree; every morning adult bees emerged from their cells were marked on the thorax with paint and returned to the hive. 10-day-old nurses were collected from the hive when marked bees of tenth day entered the cells and were nursing the larvae.
